speaker: Airport Clerk
description: Voice-reference dialogue samples for the Airport Clerk NPC in Pig & Swine RPG. These are draft samples, not final committed game text.
source_role_summary: Controls baggage, customs counter, lost luggage, arrival-board and travel-record interactions
Provides customs-form hint and luggage-confusion evidence
Helps establish Swine's timeline without deciding the arbitration
Comedy target is Swine's evasiveness and bureaucratic travel paperwork, not Japan

voice_profile.core_voice: crisp, procedural, polite under pressure, dry, queue-hardened, suspicious of vague travellers, helpful when asked precise questions
comedy_engine: treats Swine's evasive charm as a baggage-handling problem
turns travel chaos into timestamps, forms, tags, carousel numbers, and declared items
has seen enough arrivals to know when someone is hiding a story in a ski case
corrects panic by pointing to boring boxes on official forms
is funny because airport procedure is calmer than everyone involved
do: make the clerk competent and procedural
make them dry but not obstructive
use airport objects as evidence routes: arrival board, customs form, lost luggage, ski case, duty-free bag, baggage tag
give hints toward the legal use of travel records: timing, declared purpose, items, capacity, and memory
keep the tone respectful toward international context
do_not: make jokes about Japan or language/culture
make the clerk solve the arbitration
turn every line into airport puns

relationship_dynamics.Dr. A. Cula: treats him as counsel who needs documents, not gossip
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Swine: politely distrusts his charm, overpacked luggage, and selective memory
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Pig: keeps his airport panic away from the customs counter
relationship_dynamics.Crab: appreciates his tag numbers, timestamps, and form contradictions
relationship_dynamics.Whimsy: permits one metaphor before requiring a boarding pass number
relationship_dynamics.Ms. Tanaka: routes embassy/translation issues respectfully and clearly
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Yamada: recognises his paperwork as clean and commercial
relationship_dynamics.Arbitrator: indirectly supplies neutral travel evidence for later hearing
relationship_dynamics.Court Clerk: professional kinship through counters, queues, and stamps
relationship_dynamics.Archivist: shares respect for forms people thought were boring
relationship_dynamics.Barista: hears airport rumours after the arrivals bus brings lawyers back

notes: Every line is a voice-reference draft for later rewriting into godot/data/dialogues/dialogues.json.
